name: casy-sdd
description: Casy SDD — spec-driven development for Claude Code: gated spec → plan → tasks → implement → validate pipeline with sequential, parallel agent-team, and interactive debug modes. Casy-opinionated (Knex, no ORM).

plugins.name: casy-sdd
plugins.description: Spec-driven development pipeline: sequential orchestrator OR parallel agent-team lead coordinate specifier -> architect -> task-splitter -> implementer (backend/frontend) -> validator over specs/<feature>/{spec,plan,tasks}.md state files. Plus an interactive code-debug mode (investigate -> interview -> fix). Casy-opinionated (Knex, no ORM).
